cascade: Tier-1 instability classifier + Tier-2 softness regression (eigenvector regression is ill-posed, 72% degenerate)

tier2_freq_regression.note: scalar softness works; participation-tensor direction does not (<baseline)

tier1_MP_screen: 200 non-polar stable insulators (excl. 1534 training); top latent-FE = double perovskites Ba2(Ca/Dy/Er)(Mo/W/Nb/Sb)O6 + BCl3
headline: Cascade Tier-1 screen, validated by first-principles Gamma phonons (3/3), correctly flags latent ferroelectrics; Ba2CaMoO6 confirmed (soft mode -3.47 THz). Tier-2 quantifies softness (R2 0.45, sign_AUC 0.87).
